accesstype.label: Custom Record Entry Permission
accesstype.description: Access controlled by the custom record's entry permissions.

accesstype.label: No Permission Required
accesstype.description: No special permission needed — all roles can access.

accesstype.label: Use Permission List
accesstype.description: Access controlled by a defined permission list on the custom record type.

displaytype.label: Normal
displaytype.description: Standard editable field displayed on the form.

displaytype.label: Hidden
displaytype.description: Field exists on the record but is not visible on any form.

displaytype.label: Read Only
displaytype.description: Field is visible but cannot be edited by the user.

displaytype.label: Disabled
displaytype.description: Field is visible but grayed out and not editable.

displaytype.label: Inline Text
displaytype.description: Displayed as plain inline text (no input field).

customfieldcontext.label: Entity
customfieldcontext.description: Field is added to entity records (Customer, Vendor, Employee, Partner, Contact, Lead, Prospect).

customfieldcontext.label: Item
customfieldcontext.description: Field is added to item records (Inventory Item, Service Item, Non-Inventory Item, Kit, Assembly, etc.).

customfieldcontext.label: CRM
customfieldcontext.description: Field is added to CRM records (Opportunity, Task, Phone Call, Event, Campaign, etc.).

customfieldcontext.label: Transaction Body
customfieldcontext.description: Field is added to the body (header) of transaction records.

customfieldcontext.label: Transaction Column (Line)
customfieldcontext.description: Field is added as a column on transaction line items (sublists).

customfieldcontext.label: Item Number
customfieldcontext.description: Field is added to item number records (lot/serial/bin tracking).

customfieldcontext.label: Other Record
customfieldcontext.description: Field is added to other record types not covered above.

customfieldcontext.label: Custom Record
customfieldcontext.description: Field belongs to a custom record type (defined inside the customrecordtype XML).

scriptdeploymentstatus.label: Testing
scriptdeploymentstatus.description: The deployment is in testing mode — only visible to administrators.

scriptdeploymentstatus.label: Released
scriptdeploymentstatus.description: The deployment is live and active for all configured audiences.

scriptdeploymentstatus.label: Not Scheduled
scriptdeploymentstatus.description: The deployment exists but is not scheduled to run.

scriptdeploymentstatus.label: Scheduled
scriptdeploymentstatus.description: The deployment is scheduled and will run automatically.

loglevel.label: Debug
loglevel.description: All log levels are recorded (debug, audit, error, emergency).

loglevel.label: Audit
loglevel.description: Audit, error, and emergency are recorded. Debug is skipped.

loglevel.label: Error
loglevel.description: Only error and emergency are recorded.

portlettype.label: Form
portlettype.description: Renders a form-based portlet (input fields and submit button).

portlettype.label: Links
portlettype.description: Renders a list of clickable links.

portlettype.label: List
portlettype.description: Renders a tabular list of data.

audienceallroles.label: All Roles
audienceallroles.description: The script is available to all roles in the account.

audienceallroles.label: Specific Roles
audienceallroles.description: The script is restricted to specific roles defined in the audience list.

sdfobjtype.label: Custom Record Type
sdfobjtype.description: Defines a custom record type with fields, forms, and permissions.

sdfobjtype.label: Custom List
sdfobjtype.description: Defines a custom list (dropdown values).

sdfobjtype.label: Custom Segment
sdfobjtype.description: Defines a custom segment for classification and reporting across transactions and entities.

sdfobjtype.label: Custom Transaction Type
sdfobjtype.description: Defines a custom transaction type extending NetSuite's transaction framework.

sdfobjtype.label: Role
sdfobjtype.description: Defines a custom role with specific permissions, centers, and restrictions.

sdfobjtype.label: Workflow
sdfobjtype.description: Defines a SuiteFlow workflow (states, transitions, actions).

sdfobjtype.label: Center
sdfobjtype.description: Defines a navigation center in the NetSuite UI.

sdfobjtype.label: Center Tab
sdfobjtype.description: Defines a tab within a center.

sdfobjtype.label: Center Link
sdfobjtype.description: Defines a link within a center tab.

sdfobjtype.label: Center Category
sdfobjtype.description: Defines a category within a center.

sdfobjtype.label: Email Template
sdfobjtype.description: Defines an email template with merge fields and FreeMarker syntax.

sdfobjtype.label: Email Capture Plugin
sdfobjtype.description: Defines an email capture plugin configuration.

sdfobjtype.label: CRM Custom Field
sdfobjtype.description: A custom field on CRM records (Opportunity, Task, Phone Call, Event, Campaign, etc.).

sdfobjtype.label: Entity Custom Field
sdfobjtype.description: A custom field on entity records (Customer, Vendor, Employee, Partner, Contact, etc.).

sdfobjtype.label: Item Custom Field
sdfobjtype.description: A custom field on item records (Inventory, Service, Non-Inventory, Kit, Assembly, etc.).

sdfobjtype.label: Item Number Custom Field
sdfobjtype.description: A custom field on item number records (lot numbers, serial numbers, bin records).

sdfobjtype.label: Other Custom Field
sdfobjtype.description: A custom field on record types not covered by entity, item, CRM, or transaction fields.

sdfobjtype.label: Transaction Body Custom Field
sdfobjtype.description: A custom field on the body (header) of transaction records.

sdfobjtype.label: Transaction Column Custom Field
sdfobjtype.description: A custom field on line items (sublist columns) of transaction records.

sdfobjtype.label: Transaction Form
sdfobjtype.description: A custom transaction form layout.

sdfobjtype.label: Entry Form
sdfobjtype.description: A custom entry form for a record type.

sdfobjtype.label: Saved Search
sdfobjtype.description: A saved search definition.

sdfobjtype.label: KPI Scorecard
sdfobjtype.description: A KPI scorecard dashboard component.

sdfobjtype.label: Published Dashboard
sdfobjtype.description: A published dashboard layout shared across roles.

sdfobjtype.label: Dataset
sdfobjtype.description: A SuiteAnalytics dataset definition.

sdfobjtype.label: Financial Layout
sdfobjtype.description: A financial statement layout for reporting.

sdfobjtype.label: Translation Collection
sdfobjtype.description: A collection of translated strings for multi-language support.

sdfobjtype.label: Plugin Type
sdfobjtype.description: Defines a custom plug-in type (interface for plug-in implementations).

sdfobjtype.label: Plugin Implementation
sdfobjtype.description: A concrete implementation of a plug-in type.

sdfobjtype.label: Integration Record
sdfobjtype.description: An integration record for OAuth and token-based authentication.

sdfobjtype.label: SuiteCommerce Application
sdfobjtype.description: A SuiteCommerce (SSP) application definition.

sdfobjtype.label: Bundle Installation Script
sdfobjtype.description: A script that runs during SuiteBundler installation/update/uninstallation.

sdfobjtype.label: RESTlet Deployment
sdfobjtype.description: A RESTlet script deployment configuration.

sdfobjtype.label: Client Script Deployment
sdfobjtype.description: A client script deployment configuration.

sdfobjtype.label: User Event Script Deployment
sdfobjtype.description: A user event script deployment configuration.

sdfobjtype.label: Scheduled Script Deployment
sdfobjtype.description: A scheduled script deployment configuration.

sdfobjtype.label: Map/Reduce Script Deployment
sdfobjtype.description: A map/reduce script deployment configuration.

sdfobjtype.label: Suitelet Deployment
sdfobjtype.description: A Suitelet script deployment configuration.

sdfobjtype.label: Portlet Deployment
sdfobjtype.description: A portlet script deployment configuration.

sdfobjtype.label: Mass Update Script Deployment
sdfobjtype.description: A mass update script deployment configuration.

sdfobjtype.label: Workflow Action Script Deployment
sdfobjtype.description: A workflow action script deployment configuration.
